businessContext_i18n.fr: Température de la source de chaleur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura de la fuente de calor.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low SNR indicates poor signal quality.
suggestedActions: Use proper shielding for sensitive measurements.
Consider efficiency losses in energy calculations.

description.short: Calculate Carnot efficiency of an ideal heat engine.
description.long: Calculate Carnot efficiency of an ideal heat engine.

short_i18n.en: Calculate Carnot efficiency of an ideal heat engine.
short_i18n.tr: İki sıcaklık rezervuarı arasında çalışan ideal ısı makinesinin maksimum verimini hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den Carnot-Wirkungsgrad einer idealen Wärmekraftmaschine.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le rendement de Carnot d'un moteur thermique idéal.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la eficiencia de Carnot de un motor térmico ideal.
short_i18n.ar: احسب كفاءة كارنو لمحرك حراري مثالي.

long_i18n.en: Calculate Carnot efficiency of an ideal heat engine.

long_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den Carnot-Wirkungsgrad einer idealen Wärmekraftmaschine.

long_i18n.es: Calcular la eficiencia de Carnot de un motor térmico ideal.
